series_metadata.series_title: Individual employee network folders or drives
series_metadata.series_description: General correspondence, drafts, transient files, non-records, and copies of other files that employees store in a folder or portion of the network server allocated to each individual employee. This retention schedule DOES NOT apply to departmental or agency-level folders or network drives.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: two years at end of employee's employment
